raw_title: Claims of Victimhood Shield Politicians from Political Scandals
title_en: Claims of Victimhood Shield Politicians from Political Scandals
title_zh: 声称受害可保护政客免受政治丑闻影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了政客如何通过声称自己是受害者来减少政治丑闻对他们的负面影响。研究发现，当政客把自己描绘成受害者时，公众可能更同情他们，从而减轻丑闻带来的政治损害。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how politicians can reduce the negative impact of political scandals by claiming victimhood. The study finds that when politicians portray themselves as victims, the public may sympathize with them more, thereby mitigating the political damage from scandals.
research_direction_zh: 探索政治传播中叙事策略对公众认知和态度的影响，特别是危机管理和形象修复机制。
research_direction_en: Investigating how narrative strategies in political communication affect public perception and attitudes, particularly in crisis management and image repair mechanisms.
